Hi, my name is

Sayantan Mishra.

I build things for the web.

I'm a Full Stack Developer specializing in building (and occasionally designing) exceptional digital experiences. Currently focused on building accessible, human-centered products.

Get In Touch

About Me

Hello! My name is Sayantan and I enjoy creating things that live on the internet. My interest in web development started back in 2020 when I decided to try building a custom theme — turns out hacking together buttons and HTML & CSS taught me a lot!

Fast-forward to today, and I've had the privilege of working at an innovative startup and a large corporation. My main focus these days is building accessible, inclusive products and digital experiences.

Here are a few technologies I've been working with recently:

  • ▹ JavaScript (ES6+)
  • ▹ TypeScript
  • ▹ React
  • ▹ Java Spring Boot
  • ▹ Node.js
  • ▹ AWS

Some Things I've Built

🚀

Featured Project

Portfolio Website

A fast, SEO-friendly personal portfolio and blog built with Astro and Tailwind CSS. Designed with a dark minimalist aesthetic and smooth animations.
  • Astro
  • Tailwind CSS
  • TypeScript
  • Markdown
🗄️

Featured Project

Backend API Platform

A scalable REST API platform for tracking and logging application events in real-time, deployed on AWS Lambda with RDS PostgreSQL.
  • Spring Boot
  • PostgreSQL
  • Docker
  • AWS RDS

Designed & Built by Sayantan Mishra
